rows.title: Booking Confirmed! 🏡
rows.body: Your stay at {{propertyName}} is confirmed for {{checkInDate}} - {{checkOutDate}}. Tap to see check-in details.

Dear *{{1}}*,

Thank you for your payment! We have successfully received the amount for *{{2}}*.

Booking Request ID: *{{3}}*
Check-in: *{{4}}*, *{{5}}*
Check-out: *{{6}}*, *{{7}}*

*Booking Amount*
Total Amount: *{{8}}* Rs
Advance Paid: *{{9}}* Rs

This is a non-instant booking. Your request is currently under review by the property owner/admin.
We will share the confirmation status within *{{10}}* hours.

If approved, your booking will be confirmed immediately, and all details will be shared with you.
If declined, a full refund will be processed to your original payment method.

For any assistance, contact us on WhatsApp: *{{11}}*
Team InstaFarms.

Dear *{{1}}*,

Thank you for choosing InstaFarms.
Your booking is confirmed ✅

We wish you a memorable stay 🙂
Team InstaFarms

Team InstaFarms.

rows.subject: Your booking is now confirmed!
rows.body:
Your booking is now confirmed!

Hi {{customerFirstName}},

For reference, your booking ID is {{bookingId}}. To view, cancel, or modify your booking, use our easy self service.

Manage my booking

Note to the property:

Allotment under instafarms.in reservation number {{bookingId}}

{{propertyCode}}

{{propertyAddress}}

Google Map Location Link

Check in

{{checkinDate}}

(after {{checkinTime}})

Check out

{{checkoutDate}}

(before {{checkoutTime}})

You can also easily find out about the property policies, amenities and other FAQs on the Property Page

Contact property

For any questions related to the property, please contact them directly.

{{caretakerContactHTML}} {{ownerContactHTML}} InstaFarms Support Number: {{supportPhone}}

Booking Information

Number of Nights
{{bookingDays}}
Lead guest
{{customerFirstName}}
Number of Adults
{{adultCount}}
Number of Children
{{childrenCount}}
Number of Infants
{{infantCount}}
Total Guest Count
{{totalGuestCount}}
Number of Rooms
{{bedroomCount}}
{{specialRequestsHTML}}

Cancellation Policy

{{cancellationPolicyHTML}}

Your booking is confirmed

{{allGuestCount}} guest(s) X {{bookingDays}} night(s)
INR {{totalPriceOrigional}}
{{totalExtraPriceHTML}} {{totalDiscountHTML}} {{nightsDiscountsFeeHTML}}
Total Charge
INR {{bookingAmount}}

Manage my booking

Using our convenient self-service, you can sign into your account any time to re-send confirmations, get a receipt, make requests, cancel your booking, change dates or amend guest name.

Need more information or support?

Keep your booking reference number {{bookingId}} handy and within reach. You'll need it if you would like to contact our customer support.

If you think you need more support for your booking, you can reach out to the Instafarms Official Support on Whatsapp @ {{supportPhone}}

Important Notes

  • Important notice:At check-in, you must present a valid government ID with address for all the guests who are going to stay Failure to do so may result in your reservation not being honoured. Guests also have to ensure that there should not be any damage to the assets of the property. In case of a damage, customers will have to foot the bill for the same.
  • Although the bookings are usually honoured, there's a rare possibility of double bookings. In such cases, InstaFarms will try to accommodate the guests in a different property that's suitable. If we can't do that, there will be a full refund without any sort of hassle.
  • The total price for this booking does not include barbecue, bonfire etc. The property will bill you directly.
  • It is absolutely the responsibility of all the guests to ensure that all the laws of the land are properly followed. InstaFarms will not be responsible for any kind of breach wrt to the policies of the property or the laws of the land. Client has to take due caution in ensuring the same.

This is a post-only mailing. Please do not respond to this message.

We notified {{propertyCode}} ({{propertyCode}}) of your upcoming booking. We wish you a pleasant stay.
